<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension"></a>

# MultiplayerPeerExtension

**Inherits:** [MultiplayerPeer](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer) **<** [PacketPeer](class_packetpeer.md#class-packetpeer) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

Class that can be inherited to implement custom multiplayer API networking layers via GDExtension.

## Description

This class is designed to be inherited from a GDExtension plugin to implement custom networking layers for the multiplayer API (such as WebRTC). All the methods below **must** be implemented to have a working custom multiplayer implementation. See also [MultiplayerAPI](class_multiplayerapi.md#class-multiplayerapi).

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-close"></a>

 **\_close**()   [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-close)

Called when the multiplayer peer should be immediately closed (see [MultiplayerPeer.close()](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer-method-close)).

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-disconnect-peer"></a>

 **\_disconnect_peer**(p_peer: [int](class_int.md#class-int), p_force: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))   [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-disconnect-peer)

Called when the connected `p_peer` should be forcibly disconnected (see [MultiplayerPeer.disconnect_peer()](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer-method-disconnect-peer)).

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-available-packet-count"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **\_get_available_packet_count**()    [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-available-packet-count)

Called when the available packet count is internally requested by the [MultiplayerAPI](class_multiplayerapi.md#class-multiplayerapi).

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-connection-status"></a>

[ConnectionStatus](class_multiplayerpeer.md#enum-multiplayerpeer-connectionstatus) **\_get_connection_status**()    [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-connection-status)

Called when the connection status is requested on the [MultiplayerPeer](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer) (see [MultiplayerPeer.get_connection_status()](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer-method-get-connection-status)).

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-max-packet-size"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **\_get_max_packet_size**()    [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-max-packet-size)

Called when the maximum allowed packet size (in bytes) is requested by the [MultiplayerAPI](class_multiplayerapi.md#class-multiplayerapi).

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-packet"></a>

[Error](class_@globalscope.md#enum-globalscope-error) **\_get_packet**(r_buffer: `const uint8_t **`, r_buffer_size: `int32_t*`)  [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-packet)

Called when a packet needs to be received by the [MultiplayerAPI](class_multiplayerapi.md#class-multiplayerapi), with `r_buffer_size` being the size of the binary `r_buffer` in bytes.

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-packet-channel"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **\_get_packet_channel**()    [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-packet-channel)

Called to get the channel over which the next available packet was received. See [MultiplayerPeer.get_packet_channel()](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer-method-get-packet-channel).

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-packet-mode"></a>

[TransferMode](class_multiplayerpeer.md#enum-multiplayerpeer-transfermode) **\_get_packet_mode**()    [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-packet-mode)

Called to get the transfer mode the remote peer used to send the next available packet. See [MultiplayerPeer.get_packet_mode()](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer-method-get-packet-mode).

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-packet-peer"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **\_get_packet_peer**()    [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-packet-peer)

Called when the ID of the [MultiplayerPeer](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer) who sent the most recent packet is requested (see [MultiplayerPeer.get_packet_peer()](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer-method-get-packet-peer)).

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-packet-script"></a>

[PackedByteArray](class_packedbytearray.md#class-packedbytearray) **\_get_packet_script**()  [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-packet-script)

Called when a packet needs to be received by the [MultiplayerAPI](class_multiplayerapi.md#class-multiplayerapi), if [\_get_packet()](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-packet) isn't implemented. Use this when extending this class via GDScript.

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-transfer-channel"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **\_get_transfer_channel**()    [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-transfer-channel)

Called when the transfer channel to use is read on this [MultiplayerPeer](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer) (see [MultiplayerPeer.transfer_channel](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer-property-transfer-channel)).

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-transfer-mode"></a>

[TransferMode](class_multiplayerpeer.md#enum-multiplayerpeer-transfermode) **\_get_transfer_mode**()    [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-transfer-mode)

Called when the transfer mode to use is read on this [MultiplayerPeer](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer) (see [MultiplayerPeer.transfer_mode](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer-property-transfer-mode)).

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-unique-id"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **\_get_unique_id**()    [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-get-unique-id)

Called when the unique ID of this [MultiplayerPeer](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer) is requested (see [MultiplayerPeer.get_unique_id()](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer-method-get-unique-id)). The value must be between `1` and `2147483647`.

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-is-refusing-new-connections"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **\_is_refusing_new_connections**()   [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-is-refusing-new-connections)

Called when the "refuse new connections" status is requested on this [MultiplayerPeer](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer) (see [MultiplayerPeer.refuse_new_connections](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer-property-refuse-new-connections)).

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-is-server"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **\_is_server**()    [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-is-server)

Called when the "is server" status is requested on the [MultiplayerAPI](class_multiplayerapi.md#class-multiplayerapi). See [MultiplayerAPI.is_server()](class_multiplayerapi.md#class-multiplayerapi-method-is-server).

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-is-server-relay-supported"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **\_is_server_relay_supported**()   [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-is-server-relay-supported)

Called to check if the server can act as a relay in the current configuration. See [MultiplayerPeer.is_server_relay_supported()](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer-method-is-server-relay-supported).

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-poll"></a>

 **\_poll**()   [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-poll)

Called when the [MultiplayerAPI](class_multiplayerapi.md#class-multiplayerapi) is polled. See [MultiplayerAPI.poll()](class_multiplayerapi.md#class-multiplayerapi-method-poll).

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-put-packet"></a>

[Error](class_@globalscope.md#enum-globalscope-error) **\_put_packet**(p_buffer: `const uint8_t*`, p_buffer_size: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-put-packet)

Called when a packet needs to be sent by the [MultiplayerAPI](class_multiplayerapi.md#class-multiplayerapi), with `p_buffer_size` being the size of the binary `p_buffer` in bytes.

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-put-packet-script"></a>

[Error](class_@globalscope.md#enum-globalscope-error) **\_put_packet_script**(p_buffer: [PackedByteArray](class_packedbytearray.md#class-packedbytearray))  [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-put-packet-script)

Called when a packet needs to be sent by the [MultiplayerAPI](class_multiplayerapi.md#class-multiplayerapi), if [\_put_packet()](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-put-packet) isn't implemented. Use this when extending this class via GDScript.

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-set-refuse-new-connections"></a>

 **\_set_refuse_new_connections**(p_enable: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))  [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-set-refuse-new-connections)

Called when the "refuse new connections" status is set on this [MultiplayerPeer](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer) (see [MultiplayerPeer.refuse_new_connections](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer-property-refuse-new-connections)).

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-set-target-peer"></a>

 **\_set_target_peer**(p_peer: [int](class_int.md#class-int))   [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-set-target-peer)

Called when the target peer to use is set for this [MultiplayerPeer](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer) (see [MultiplayerPeer.set_target_peer()](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer-method-set-target-peer)).

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-set-transfer-channel"></a>

 **\_set_transfer_channel**(p_channel: [int](class_int.md#class-int))   [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-set-transfer-channel)

Called when the channel to use is set for this [MultiplayerPeer](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer) (see [MultiplayerPeer.transfer_channel](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer-property-transfer-channel)).

---

<a id="class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-set-transfer-mode"></a>

 **\_set_transfer_mode**(p_mode: [TransferMode](class_multiplayerpeer.md#enum-multiplayerpeer-transfermode))   [🔗](#class-multiplayerpeerextension-private-method-set-transfer-mode)

Called when the transfer mode is set on this [MultiplayerPeer](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer) (see [MultiplayerPeer.transfer_mode](class_multiplayerpeer.md#class-multiplayerpeer-property-transfer-mode)).
